Hi, thanks for visiting my page.

I am a Software Developer with 5 years of experience and love making pixels move on the screen. My start was in Game Development, and I’m still passionate about Graphics and Games, but I have significantly expanded my skill repertoire over the years. Having worked with a variety of customers on different projects, I love taking ownership and am experienced in all phases of software development: From conceptualizing and planning, to development, deployment and support.

Download my Resume.

Skills

Language : C++, C#, PLSQL, Python

Version Control : Git, Perforce

Game Engines : Unreal Engine, Unity3D, Godot

Areas of Expertise : Real-Time Systems, Application Development, 3D Graphics Development

Work Experience

Software Engineer - C++ / SQL @ KNAPP AG - (Apr 2024 - Present)

  • Developing custom features based on customer requests, in an event-based architecture.
  • Supported QA and commissioning teams throughout all project phases, contributing to smooth launches and high‑quality deliveries.
  • Mentored junior team-members on software development topics, internal processes and company-specific practices.
  • Held presentations for stakeholders, displaying developments and implementing feedback.

Software Engineer - C++ / Unreal Engine @ blackshark.ai - (Aug 2021 - Nov 2023)

  • Delivered end‑to‑end customer POCs, interpreting client data with the company’s visual product and leading project presentations to customers.
  • Implemented global procedural foliage placement via a compute shader for improved realism and performance.
  • Built data‑driven airport‑light simulations, enhancing training‑simulation fidelity.
  • Automated generation of 20,000+ ML training images through a Python pipeline for image manipulation and sanitation.

Software Engineer - C++ / Unreal Engine @ Virtual Builders - (Nov 2019 - Dec 2020)

  • Created real-time, data-driven Unreal applications that got deployed on AWS and embedded in client websites via Unreal pixelstreaming.
  • Exposed client logic via blueprints, for easy configuration by sales personnel.
